channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: First Dog on the Moon jokes about unread classic novels and internet distractions
item.description: This satirical opinion piece from The Guardian, created by cartoonist First Dog on the Moon, humorously reflects on the challenge of reading acclaimed literary classics. Using the idea of a ‘100 best ...

item.title: AIADMK dissident MLA C.Ve. Shanmugam visits Mailam constituency amid internal party reconciliation signals
item.description: Senior AIADMK leader and rebel MLA C.Ve. Shanmugam visited his Mailam Assembly constituency in Villupuram district, Tamil Nadu, shortly after a significant development within the party where a rival f...

item.title: Saturn's Apparent Changing Rotation Explained by Atmospheric Aurora-Driven Winds
item.description: After decades of puzzling observations suggesting that Saturn's rotation rate was changing, astronomers have finally uncovered the true cause of this apparent phenomenon. Using the James Webb Space Te...

item.title: Police identify suspect in killing of barangay watchman and vendor in Cavite
item.description: Police authorities in Dasmariñas, Cavite have confirmed that they have already identified the suspect involved in the killing of a barangay watchman and a vendor that took place recently. However, off...

item.title: Plateau State and Namibia deepen cooperation on tourism, mining, livestock and trade development
item.description: The Plateau State Government in Nigeria and the Republic of Namibia have started high-level talks aimed at building a strategic partnership that covers tourism, mining, wildlife conservation, livestoc...

item.title: Pam Bondi Testifies in Closed-Door Epstein Hearing with Minimal Republican Attendance
item.description: Former Florida Attorney General Pam Bondi appeared before the House Oversight and Government Reform Committee on May 29, 2026, to provide testimony regarding the Justice Department's handling of the J...

item.title: University of Dar es Salaam Clarifies Fake Degree Certificate Image Circulating Online
item.description: There is one image wey don dey go viral for social media wey people dey claim say one Tanzanian graduate use him University of Dar es Salaam degree certificate to wrap mandazi, the popular East Africa...

item.title: Puregold and GCash Expand End-to-End Digital Payments to Filipino Sari-Sari Stores
item.description: Puregold Price Club has partnered with GCash for Business to broaden access to end-to-end digital financial tools for sari-sari store owners across the Philippines. The initiative aims to simplify pay...

item.title: UNDP Tanzania partners with universities to strengthen graduate skills, innovation and job readiness
item.description: The United Nations Development Programme (UNDP) in Tanzania has entered into formal cooperation agreements with nine higher learning institutions in a move aimed at improving youth employability, inno...

item.title: Maltina marks 50 years with nationwide joy campaign featuring flash mobs and gifting experiences
item.description: Maltina has rolled out a nationwide initiative aimed at reconnecting Nigerians with simple, childlike joy as part of its “Nourishment Fit For You” platform. The brand focused on creating shared experi...

item.title: Chris Scott questions AFL score review after controversial first-quarter decision in close Geelong loss
item.description: Geelong coach Chris Scott has raised concerns about the AFL’s score review system following a contentious decision in their narrow loss to Carlton at the MCG. Early in the game, a potential first goal...

item.title: Nigerian Breweries names Nkechi Runsewe as new HR Director
item.description: Nigerian Breweries Plc, one of Nigeria’s leading brewing companies, don officially announce say Nkechi Runsewe go become their new Human Resources Director starting from 1st August 2026. She go take o...

item.title: Pope Leo XIV and PM Modi call for human-centric and accountable AI governance
item.description: The article highlights the strong convergence between the views of Pope Leo XIV and Prime Minister Narendra Modi on the governance and ethical use of artificial intelligence. In his encyclical titled ...

item.title: Leonard McCombe’s 1948 LIFE Photo Essay Documents Navajo Daily Life and Hardships
item.description: In 1948, LIFE magazine photographer Leonard McCombe produced a powerful photo essay documenting the daily lives of the Diné (Navajo) people during a period of extreme hardship in the late 1940s. His w...

item.title: Wike threatens to revoke land titles of Abuja venues hosting unrecognised political groups

item.title: FirstHoldco shareholders approve plan to build ₦1 trillion capital base
item.description: FirstHoldCo Plc, the parent company of FirstBank and one of Nigeria’s most systemically important financial groups, has secured approval from its shareholders to pursue a major capital strengthening p...

item.title: Gawad Kalinga founder Tony Meloto arrested on sex-trafficking charges in Bulacan
item.description: The Philippine National Police arrested Tony Meloto, founder of the GK (Gawad Kalinga) movement, in Angat, Bulacan, on May 29, 2026. The arrest followed a regional trial court’s warrant issued in Malo...

item.title: Police testimony links Bishnoi gang to coordinated extortion network operating across Canada
item.description: Testimony presented during an Immigration and Refugee Board hearing revealed that the Lawrence Bishnoi gang allegedly sent a letter to police in Abbotsford, British Columbia, in August 2025 claiming i...

item.title: Bloemfontein man sentenced to two life terms for repeatedly raping vulnerable young woman living in his home
item.description: A 50-year-old married man from Bloemfontein has been sentenced to two life terms in prison after being convicted of repeatedly raping a 20-year-old woman who lived under his care and was regarded as h...

item.title: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth faces criticism for speech to Navy sailors during Singapore visit
item.description: U.S. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth drew widespread criticism after delivering a brief motivational speech to Navy sailors during a visit aboard the USS Boxer, which was docked in Singapore. The appea...
